message:
test(core): add fleet coordinator runtime integration tests (ft-dwjtm)

Add 6 tests for the runtime's fleet coordinator helpers:
- fleet_pane_infos_from_empty_registry: empty registry yields empty infos
- fleet_pane_infos_excludes_ignored_panes: Ignored observation filtered
- fleet_pane_infos_warm_pages_divides_correctly: page count matches div_ceil
- build_fleet_pressure_signals_green_at_low_utilization: low queues → Green
- build_fleet_pressure_signals_zero_capacity_is_green: zero caps handled
- build_fleet_pressure_signals_propagates_memory_pressure: tier passthrough

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
